description_long: This garage structure features two main sections joined by a central walkway, with a distinctive angular roof design. The exterior walls are clad in a mix of stone and brick, giving it a modern yet robust appearance. Large, dark-framed windows and doors dominate one side, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. A cylindrical blue element, possibly a water tank or utility feature, is situated between the two main sections. The garage door is a single, wide panel with a minimalist design, accompanied by a standard entry door. The overall look is clean and functional, suitable for a residential urban environment.
description: A modern, stone-and-brick garage with angular roofs, large windows, and a single wide garage door. Features a central blue cylindrical element and minimalist detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing both main sections, the central blue cylinder, and the wide garage door with adjacent entry door.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the large windows and brickwork on the right section, with the roof's unique geometry visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back walls of both sections, the central blue cylinder, and no visible doors or windows.
description_view_3: Opposite end view showing the stone-clad wall with the garage door and entry door, minimal window presence.
